title: Climate Change Impact in Agriculture: Vulnerability and Adaptation Concerns of Semiarid Tropics in Asia
abstract:
There is global consensus that current climate is
changing, mainly due to the anthropogenic emissions
of green house gases (GHG) (IPCC 2007b).
Also, there is widespread concern over long-term
climate changes and changes in climate variability
through occurrence of extreme weather events
such as cyclones, floods, droughts, sea level rise,
etc. Agriculture is one sector of the economy that
is exposed directly and considerably affected by
climate and its changes...........
